experience_chunks.description: Developed and maintained multiple production features for mobile apps, including shopping flow, push notification system, and offline-first sync layer.
Built React-based admin interfaces and Node.js REST API for web applications.
Built and maintained data pipelines on Apache Airflow processing ~500GB of daily transactional data across 12 source systems at PharmEasy.
Backend development with Python (FastAPI), PostgreSQL, and Redis at a B2B SaaS product at PolicyBazaar.
